user.title: Skylight
user.description: How do you want to connect to your Skylight account?

password.title: Skylight login
password.description: Enter your Skylight account email and password. They are stored only in Home Assistant and used to obtain short-lived access tokens.

token.title: Skylight access token
token.description: Paste a Bearer access token captured from the Skylight app (Authorization header). Note: tokens expire after ~2 hours and cannot be auto-refreshed without your email/password.

frame.title: Choose a frame
frame.description: Select which Skylight frame (calendar) to add.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Skylight. Check your connection and try again.

abort.no_frames: No frames were found on this account.
